title: Fix interface parameters used by upper generate loop resolve late

features.name: interface with parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a generic parameter

features.name: interface parameter override on instantiation
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation that overrides the parameter value

features.name: interface passed through module port
features.description: Code should include a module that accepts an interface through its port

features.name: generate for-loop bound with interface parameter
features.description: Code should include a generate for-loop where the loop bound references an interface parameter
features.snippet: genvar i; generate for (i = 0; i != g.WIDTH; i = i + 1) begin : tt end endgenerate

features.name: array sized with interface parameter
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array whose size is determined by an interface parameter
